MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Erin Carpenter, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Union Carbide Corporation

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted as modified. Defendant Union Carbide Corporation's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses; And For Sanctions.
1. Defendant Union Carbide Corporation's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses granted as follows:
a. All objections to defendant Union Carbide Corporation's Special Interrogatories [Set One], Request For Production Of Documents [Set One], Form Interrogatories [Set One], and Request For Admissions [Set One]-except for attorney-client and attorney work product privilege-are waived.
b. Plaintiff shall serve full, complete, and verified responses to Special Interrogatories [Set One], Request for Production Of Documents [Set One], Form Interrogatories [Set One], and Request For Admissions [Set One] within fifteen days of the date of this order.
2. Sanctions shall issue against plaintiff in the sum of $350.00, imposition of sanctions stayed for fifteen days; if plaintiff serves full, complete, and verified responses to Special Interrogatories [Set One], Request for Production Of Documents [Set One], Form Interrogatories [Set One], and Request For Admissions [Set One] as ordered, sanctions will be permanently stayed.
MODIFICATION. Request for admissions deemed admitted. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.
